results.pred_sql:
SELECT s.Name
FROM shop s
JOIN hiring h ON s.Shop_ID = h.Shop_ID
GROUP BY s.Name
ORDER BY COUNT(h.Employee_ID) DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: Find the number of employees hired in each shop; show the shop name as well.

results.question: For each shop, return the number of employees working there and the name of the shop.
